  • theweddingcabana

    With the sound of Punjabi dhol and their family dancing around them, A&B made the happiest entry into their haldi.

    From the arches of blooms to the smallest details on every table, sunflowers were everywhere. Aastha had dreamt of them for her haldi from the very start, and we loved weaving that sunshine into every corner of the day.

    Captured by: @ivoryfilms.in
    Decor by: @panachedecorsofficial
    Venue: @oleanderfarms
